baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare it against a no-skill baseline or previous-version snapshot using the same prompt and inputs.

evals.prompt: Optimize this React Native screen with a slow scrolling list and image-heavy rows.
evals.expected_output: A React Native performance fix using list virtualization, stable row props, image optimization, and platform-appropriate validation.
assertions: Considers FlashList or equivalent virtualization for large lists.
Stabilizes callbacks, item components, and inline objects.
Notes React Native or Expo validation commands.
